phase_description: Shadow mode - Dry-run monitoring. Pipeline runs end-to-end but proposal_executor does not actually trade. All decisions logged to data/proposal_executor_log.json for divergence analysis vs human decisions.
phase_17_exit_criteria: If divergence < 10% over 14 days → promote to LIVE (Phase 18)

modes.SHADOW: Pipeline runs, executor logs intent but does NOT trade. Guards + verdicts still enforced on paper (checked before shadow-log).
modes.LIVE: Full autonomy. Proposal executor executes real paper trades. Guard 0c2 (Deep Dive Verdict) + weekly trade limit still apply.
